description.value: Your body can adapt and change even faster than most other copaxis. You can retrain using your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Regenerative Evolution] feature over 1 week of downtime instead of 1 month. At 13th level, you can use regenerative evolution to retrain one feat or skill increase during your daily preparations. You can't use regenerative evolution to retrain Heightened Metabolic Adaptation.
